title: 闇の中にうごめく影は……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash and I are walking around the
academy after training when we happen to spot a
suspicious figure stumbling about.

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text: Unngh... Aaagh... Nnghhh!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what's wrong with that person? Perhaps
they don't feel well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not it. Their movements are too erratic
for someone who is unwell...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The figure sways to-and-fro, shoulders slumped
and arms hanging limp as they walk. In fact...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What?! Trainer, please do not say such
nonsensical things.

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text: Unngh... Braaains!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: N-no... They're probably just hungry.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, we should see if they're all right. If
they're not well, they may need help.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Um... are you okay? If you're feeling poorly—

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Person
text_block_list.text: Uuungh... NRAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: EEEEEK!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One look at the person's terrifying face as they lunge at us and there's no mistaking it—they really are a zombie!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant! Pant! How can this be?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But that's impossible! I admit their unpredictable
movements resemble those of a zombie...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But I cannot accept that such unscientific,
irrational phenomena exist in this wo—

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Graaah!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: EEEEEK!
choice_data_list: We have to stand and fight...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I-I... won't believe it! Zombies cannot physically
exist!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Urraaagh!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: M-my legs w-won't move! I-I'm too scared!

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Urgh! Mragh nngh gaaah!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I-I'm done for! Save yourself!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Uraaaaagh! Nnngh hraaah grrr!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thankfully, the zombie is slow, so I manage to
pull Eishin Flash out of there and make a clean
getaway.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... D-did we... make it out alive?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Th-thank... Thank goodness...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Um, a-apologies... for my earlier behavior and...
f-for grabbing your hand like that...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A-anyways! Thank you for saving me. Had you not
been so quick to take action, I would not have
been able to escape.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: From... From the bottom of my heart, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Oh. I'd better return to the dorm. It's getting
late.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you! You have done so much for me as
it is...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: To be honest, I was very frightened earli—

text_block_list.name: Zombie(?)
text_block_list.text:
Pheeew! Man, it's hard to breathe in these
full-face masks.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But I managed a full thirty minutes in it! I feel
sooooo much better now.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Nothing makes you appreciate being
alive more than a good ol' zombie routine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After learning the truth, Eishin Flash would glare
at Gold Ship for the next three days with eyes
cold enough to freeze the Arctic twice over
whenever they crossed paths...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
B-be that as it may, I don't know of any
countermeasures against a zombie!
choice_data_list: Do you have any talismans or charms?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Charms?! Y-yes, I do! I-I have this one for transit
safety!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Take this!

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Aaagh? Tch, tch.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I-it didn't work! Wh-wh-what do we do now?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
O-okay... Oh, higher power above! Vanquish this
impure soul!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Cast them into the furthest reaches of... uh,
anywhere but here! Please! I beg of you!

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Ho, ho, ho, ho!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Wha... Why is it squat dancing?! It's no use! Our
prayers didn't work either!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Now what? Is all hope lost?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A warding spell! That's it! I'm sure it'll work on
such an evil spirit!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Toi, toi, toi... Toi, toi, toi, toi, toi, toi!

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: ...Raaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I-it's working! Toi, toi, toi, toi, toi!

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: URAAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: W-we did it! We defeated the zombie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the instant the zombie falls to the ground, a
full-face mask slips off its head.

text_block_list.name: Zombie(?)
text_block_list.text:
Whew, that was thirty minutes on the nose! As
they say, it's best to be left wanting a little more.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, Golshi, but what exactly were you
doing?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I was doing a zombie routine to appreciate
being alive, obviously. You mean you don't?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, cheeseburgers!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: It's almost time for my Rickshaw Drift: Wooden Wheels of Fury routine!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I have no words. I'm just so very relieved it was not a real zombie...
